features.name: Project Setup
features.description: Bootstrap monorepo: packages/api, packages/admin, packages/pwa, Prisma schema, Docker

features.name: Admin Authentication
features.description: Registration, login, JWT tokens, refresh, rate limiting (US-001)

features.name: Company Profile Setup
features.description: Company settings, Yandex Maps URL, discount config (US-003)

features.name: Client Management
features.description: CRUD clients, CSV import, phone encryption (US-002)

features.name: SMS Integration
features.description: SMSC.ru API wrapper, send review requests, delivery tracking (US-004, US-010)

features.name: PWA Review Form
features.description: Mobile form: stars + text, company branding, discount display (US-014, US-015, US-016)

features.name: Sentiment Analysis
features.description: LLM API integration, sentiment routing, star fallback (US-019, US-020, US-021)

features.name: Review Routing
features.description: Positive → Yandex redirect, negative → hidden section, promo codes (US-017, US-022)

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: SMS stats, review counts, conversion rate, rating trend (US-006, US-007)

features.name: Cascade Reminders
features.description: 4-step SMS cascade (2h→24h→3d→7d), cancellation on review/opt-out (US-011, US-012)

features.name: Custom SMS Templates
features.description: Admin-customizable SMS text per reminder step (US-008)

features.name: Admin Panel UI
features.description: Full React admin panel: dashboard, clients, reviews, settings pages

features.name: Multi-Channel Messaging (Telegram + Max)
features.description: Send review requests via Telegram and Max messengers alongside SMS, with per-admin bot config, encrypted chat IDs, SMS fallback, and channel-specific templates

features.name: Messenger Auto-Linking
features.description: Auto-link Telegram/Max clients via bot deep links + webhooks instead of manual chat_id entry

features.name: Channel Analytics
features.description: Analytics breakdown by channel (SMS vs Telegram vs Max): delivery rates, conversion per channel, cost comparison

features.name: Batch Send UI
features.description: Admin panel UI for selecting multiple clients and sending review requests in bulk with channel selection

features.name: Max Webhook Authentication
features.description: Add IP allowlist or per-admin secret tokens for Max webhook endpoints (SEC-02 deferred)
